AR1.justification: Routed to resources/ with explicit rationale walking through every alternative, but the scenario's signal-bearing behavior is routing the unverified AI summary to tmp/<topic>/ for triage; resources/ is a defensible neighbor since the agent honored the user's stated 'keep it' constraint and named the provenance gap, but it still places provisional summary-only material in durable reference.

AR2.justification: n/a — non-procedure routing scenario; no artifacts were written to the workspace, only a recommendation was given.

AR3.justification: All references to other files (resources/AGENTS.md, projects/AGENTS.md, tmp/AGENTS.md, resources/prompt-cache-side-channel-tldr.md) use relative paths consistent with the methodology convention.

AR4.justification: The proposed flat-file drop plus daybook log line plus later promotion-to-folder pattern is idempotent and append-only; re-running would not corrupt history.
